name: Schedule

task.description: Build a conference schedule page for 'DevConf 2026' at 1920px wide as a multi-track timetable. A header shows the conference name, date 'June 15, 2026', and a 3-tab track filter (All, Frontend, Backend). The schedule is a grid: a left time column (9:00 to 13:00 in 30-min rows, 9 rows) and THREE track columns (Main Stage, Frontend, Backend) of equal width. At least 8 session blocks are placed in the grid, each showing a title, speaker, and a colored tag for its track; at least one session spans two time rows (a 60-min talk) and the 10:00 keynote spans all three track columns. Below the grid, a legend mapping the three track colors. Responsive: at 375px the three track columns stack into a single vertical list grouped by time.
requirements: A header shows 'DevConf 2026', the date 'June 15, 2026', and a three-tab track filter
A left time column lists 9:00 through 13:00 in 30-minute increments (9 rows)
There are three equal-width track columns labeled Main Stage, Frontend, Backend, aligned to the time rows
At least eight session blocks appear, each with a title, a speaker, and a track-colored tag
At least one session block visibly spans two 30-minute rows
The 10:00 keynote spans the full width of all three track columns
A legend maps each of the three track colors to its track name
Session blocks align to their time-row boundaries without overlapping adjacent blocks
At 375px the track columns stack into a single time-ordered vertical list
Track tag colors are used consistently between the blocks and the legend

trace.output:
<think>
Let me build a comprehensive conference schedule page for DevConf 2026. I'll create a multi-track timetable with all the required features.

Key requirements:
1. Header with conference name, date, and 3-tab filter
2. Left time column (9:00-13:00, 30-min increments = 9 rows)
3. Three equal-width track columns (Main Stage, Frontend, Backend)
4. At least 8 session blocks with title, speaker, track-colored tag
5. At least one session spanning 2 rows (60 min)
6. 10:00 keynote spanning all 3 columns


7. Legend for track colors
8. Responsive at 375px

Now I'm mapping out the time slots and planning the CSS Grid structure with columns for time, main stage, frontend, and backend tracks. I'll populate the schedule with at least 8 sessions, including the opening ceremony at 9:00 and the keynote at 10:00 that spans across all tracks. I'm realizing I need to reconsider the grid structure more carefully. Instead of trying to fit everything into a rigid layout, I should think about this as time slots where each 30-minute interval gets its own row, giving me about 8 rows total from 9:00 to 1:00 PM. This will make it easier to handle sessions that span different durations and align them properly across the three tracks. I'm settling on a dark professional color scheme with a violet tag for the main stage, emerald for frontend sessions, and amber for backend content.

Now I'm structuring the HTML and CSS with a grid layout—I'll set up 4 columns for time, main stage, frontend, and backend tracks, then define 9 rows for the time slots so sessions can span multiple rows properly. Writing the grid structure... I'm working through the schedule grid more carefully now. The keynote at 10:00 spans all columns for a full hour, so I need to make sure nothing else occupies those time slots. Let me map out the 9:00 and 9:30 sessions to avoid conflicts—the 9:30 talks should end right at 10:00 when the keynote takes over all three tracks. Looking at the session count, I'm way over the target—15 talks is too many for a reasonable conference schedule. I need to cut this down significantly and then set up the filtering mechanism with JavaScript to toggle between tracks, plus use CSS grid with explicit positioning to lay everything out cleanly.

Writing the schedule markup... Setting up the grid structure with 10 rows total—one header row at 60px and nine time slots at 80px each—to properly position all the conference sessions across the three tracks. Writing the complete schedule file...
</think>
```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>DevConf 2026 — Schedule</title>
<style>
  /* ── RESET & BASE ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  :root {
    --bg:        #07090F;
    --surface:   #0E1322;
    --surface2:  #131B30;
    --border:    #1D2847;
    --text:      #EFF2FA;
    --muted:     #7A87A8;
    --accent:    #5B6EF5;

    --main-hue:  #7C3AED;
    --main-lite: rgba(124,58,237,.15);
    --fe-hue:    #059669;
    --fe-lite:   rgba(5,150,105,.15);
    --be-hue:    #D97706;
    --be-lite:   rgba(217,119,6,.15);
    --key-hue:   #E84393;
    --key-lite:  rgba(232,67,147,.12);

    --row-h:     88px;
    --time-w:    90px;
    --gap:       6px;
    --radius:    10px;
    --font:      'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif;
  }

  body {
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--text);
    font-family: var(--font);
    min-height: 100vh;
    overflow-x: hidden;
  }

  /* ── HEADER ───────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .header {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0B0F20 0%, #120B2E 50%, #0B1626 100%);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    padding: 40px 80px 0;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .header::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background: radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 80% at 80% 50%, rgba(91,110,245,.12) 0%, transparent 70%),
                radial-gradient(ellipse 40% 60% at 20% 30%, rgba(124,58,237,.1) 0%, transparent 70%);
    pointer-events: none;
  }
  .header-inner {
    max-width: 1760px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-end;
    gap: 48px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }
  .header-brand { flex: 1 1 auto; }
  .conf-eyebrow {
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: .18em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--accent);
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }
  .conf-title {
    font-size: 52px;
    font-weight: 900;
    line-height: 1;
    letter-spacing: -.02em;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fff 30%, #9BA8FF 100%);
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    background-clip: text;
  }
  .conf-date {
    margin-top: 10px;
    font-size: 16px;
    color: var(--muted);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
  }
  .conf-date::before {
    content: '📅';
    font-size: 14px;
  }

  /* ── TABS ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .tabs {
    display: flex;
    gap: 4px;
    align-self: flex-end;
    padding-bottom: 0;
  }
  .tab {
    padding: 10px 28px;
    border-radius: 8px 8px 0 0;
    border: 1px solid transparent;
    border-bottom: none;
    background: transparent;
    color: var(--muted);
    font: 600 14px var(--font);
    letter-spacing: .04em;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all .2s;
    position: relative;
    top: 1px;
  }
  .tab:hover { color: var(--text); background: var(--surface); }
  .tab.active {
    color: #fff;
    background: var(--surface);
    border-color: var(--border);
    border-bottom-color: var(--surface);
  }
  .tab[data-filter="all"].active   { box-shadow: 0 -2px 0 var(--accent) inset; }
  .tab[data-filter="frontend"].active { box-shadow: 0 -2px 0 var(--fe-hue) inset; }
  .tab[data-filter="backend"].active  { box-shadow: 0 -2px 0 var(--be-hue) inset; }

  /* ── MAIN ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .main {
    max-width: 1760px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 40px 80px 60px;
  }

  /* ── SCHEDULE GRID ────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .schedule-wrapper {
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 14px;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: var(--surface);
  }

  .schedule-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: var(--time-w) 1fr 1fr 1fr;
    /* row 1 = col headers, rows 2-10 = time slots 9:00–13:00 */
    grid-template-rows: 56px repeat(9, var(--row-h));
    gap: 0;
  }

  /* ── COLUMN HEADERS ───────────────────────────────────────── */
  .col-header {
    grid-row: 1;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: .08em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    padding: 0 12px;
    gap: 8px;
  }
  .col-header.time-head { grid-column: 1; color: var(--muted); font-size: 11px; }
  .col-header.main-head { grid-column: 2; color: #C4B5FD; background: rgba(124,58,237,.07); border-left: 1px solid var(--border); }
  .col-header.fe-head   { grid-column: 3; color: #6EE7B7; background: rgba(5,150,105,.07);  border-left: 1px solid var(--border); }
  .col-header.be-head   { grid-column: 4; color: #FCD34D; background: rgba(217,119,6,.07);  border-left: 1px solid var(--border); }
  .col-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; }

  /* ── TIME LABELS ──────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .time-label {
    grid-column: 1;
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-start;
    justify-content: flex-end;
    padding: 10px 14px 0 0;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--muted);
    letter-spacing: .05em;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    position: relative;
  }

  /* ── TRACK CELLS (background) ─────────────────────────────── */
  .track-cell {
    border-left: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    background: var(--surface);
    padding: var(--gap);
    position: relative;
  }
  .track-cell:nth-child(odd) { background: var(--surface2); }

  /* ── SESSION BLOCKS ───────────────────────────────────────── */
  .session {
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    padding: 12px 14px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 6px;
    height: 100%;
    border: 1px solid transparent;
    transition: transform .15s, box-shadow .15s;
    cursor: pointer;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .session:hover {
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.4);
    z-index: 2;
  }
  .session-title {
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 700;
    line-height: 1.3;
    color: #fff;
  }
  .session-speaker {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,.6);
    font-weight: 500;
  }
  .session-speaker::before { content: '👤 '; font-size: 10px; }
  .session-tag {
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: .1em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 3px 8px;
    border-radius: 20px;
    width: fit-content;
    margin-top: auto;
  }

  /* MAIN STAGE session */
  .session.s-main {
    background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(124,58,237,.22) 0%, rgba(124,58,237,.08) 100%);
    border-color: rgba(124,58,237,.35);
  }
  .session.s-main .session-tag { background: rgba(124,58,237,.3); color: #C4B5FD; border: 1px solid rgba(124,58,237,.5); }

  /* FRONTEND session */
  .session.s-fe {
    background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(5,150,105,.22) 0%, rgba(5,150,105,.08) 100%);
    border-color: rgba(5,150,105,.35);
  }
  .session.s-fe .session-tag { background: rgba(5,150,105,.3); color: #6EE7B7; border: 1px solid rgba(5,150,105,.5); }

  /* BACKEND session */
  .session.s-be {
    background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(217,119,6,.22) 0%, rgba(217,119,6,.08) 100%);
    border-color: rgba(217,119,6,.35);
  }
  .session.s-be .session-tag { background: rgba(217,119,6,.3); color: #FCD34D; border: 1px solid rgba(217,119,6,.5); }

  /* KEYNOTE session (spans all columns) */
  .session.s-key {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(232,67,147,.2) 0%, rgba(91,110,245,.2) 100%);
    border-color: rgba(232,67,147,.4);
    flex-direction: row;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 24px;
    padding: 20px 32px;
  }
  .session.s-key .session-tag { background: rgba(232,67,147,.3); color: #F9A8D4; border: 1px solid rgba(232,67,147,.5); margin-top: 0; }
  .session.s-key .session-title { font-size: 20px; }
  .session.s-key .session-speaker { font-size: 14px; }
  .key-badge {
    font-size: 10px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: .14em; text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 6px 14px; background: rgba(232,67,147,.25); border: 1px solid rgba(232,67,147,.5);
    border-radius: 20px; color: #F9A8D4; white-space: nowrap; flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .key-icon { font-size: 36px; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .key-text { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; }

  /* ── GRID PLACEMENT ─────────────────────────────────────────*/
  /* Time labels */
  .t-900  { grid-row: 2; }
  .t-930  { grid-row: 3; }
  .t-1000 { grid-row: 4; }
  .t-1030 { grid-row: 5; }
  .t-1100 { grid-row: 6; }
  .t-1130 { grid-row: 7; }
  .t-1200 { grid-row: 8; }
  .t-1230 { grid-row: 9; }
  .t-1300 { grid-row: 10; }

  /* 9:00 — row 2 */
  .s1 { grid-column: 2; grid-row: 2; }
  .s2 { grid-column: 3; grid-row: 2; }
  .s3 { grid-column: 4; grid-row: 2; }

  /* 9:30 — row 3 */
  .s4 { grid-column: 2; grid-row: 3; }
  .s5 { grid-column: 3; grid-row: 3; }
  .s6 { grid-column: 4; grid-row: 3; }

  /* 10:00 KEYNOTE — rows 4–5, cols 2–4 (60 min, all tracks) */
  .s-keynote { grid-column: 2 / 5; grid-row: 4 / 6; }

  /* 11:00 — row 6; Main Stage spans 2 rows (60 min) */
  .s7  { grid-column: 2; grid-row: 6 / 8; }   /* Main Stage 60 min */
  .s8  { grid-column: 3; grid-row: 6; }
  .s9  { grid-column: 4; grid-row: 6; }

  /* 11:30 — row 7 (Main Stage occupied) */
  .s10 { grid-column: 3; grid-row: 7; }
  .s11 { grid-column: 

… [truncated, 15,636 more characters]

trace.feedback:
Quality score: 70%
DOES NOT MEET REQUIREMENTS

Issues found:
  1. [CRITICAL] The keynote session at 10:00 does not span the full width of all three track columns as required - it appears only in the Main Stage column (at center)
  2. [MAJOR] Track columns appear to have unequal widths - the Main Stage column looks wider than Frontend and Backend columns (at center)
  3. [MINOR] The rocket emoji in the keynote session creates visual inconsistency compared to other session blocks (at center)

Suggested fixes:
  1. Make the keynote session span across all three track columns as specified
  2. Ensure all three track columns have equal widths
  3. Remove decorative elements like the rocket emoji to maintain visual consistency across session blocks
trace.output:
<think>
Let me analyze the issues:

1. **CRITICAL**: The keynote doesn't span all three track columns. Looking at the CSS, the keynote has `grid-column: 2 / 5` and `grid-row: 4 / 6` in the CSS classes, but the inline style on the div also says `style="grid-column:2/5;grid-row:4/6;"`. The problem might be that the grid template only has 4 columns (time + 3 tracks), so `grid-column: 2/5` should span columns 2, 3, and 4. Let me look more carefully...
   
Actually, wait—the grid has 4 columns total, so `grid-column: 2/5` should correctly span all three track columns. But the keynote is only appearing in the Main Stage column, which suggests the `.track-cell` elements might not be positioned correctly in the grid, or there's something about how the HTML structure is laying out that's causing the keynote to be constrained to a single column instead of spanning across all three. The keynote should be correctly positioned at grid-row 4/6 for the 10:00-11:00 slot, but I'm wondering if auto-placed empty cells are interfering with the layout instead. the content sessions, and I'm mapping out where each session is positioned in the grid to understand the layout structure and identify any overlaps or empty spaces that might be causing the rendering issue.

Looking at the HTML structure now to see if there's a mismatch between the CSS grid placement and the inline styles applied to the elements. Looking at the reviewer's feedback, I need to address three specific issues: the keynote should span all three track columns, the track columns appear to have unequal widths, and I should remove the rocket emoji. The grid CSS already specifies `grid-column: 2/5` both inline and in the class, so the spanning should work—but let me verify this is actually applying and make the necessary adjustments to fix the layout. Applying targeted CSS fixes to the grid layout and removing the rocket emoji from the keynote element to resolve the spanning and width issues.
</think>
Looking at the three issues, I need to:
1. Fix the keynote column span (change `2/5` to `2 / span 3` and remove conflicting inline overrides)
2. Fix unequal column widths by using `minmax(0, 1fr)` in the grid template
3. Remove the rocket emoji from the keynote block

```html

<head>

<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>DevConf 2026 — Schedule</title>

    /* FIX: use minmax(0, 1fr) for equal track columns */
    grid-template-columns: var(--time-w) minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(0, 1fr);
    /* row 1 = col headers, rows 2-10 = time slots 9:00–13:00 */
    grid-template-rows: 56px repeat(9, var(--row-h));
    gap: 0;
  }

  /* ── COLUMN HEADERS ───────────────────────────────────────── */
  .col-header {
    grid-row: 1;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: .08em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    padding: 0 12px;
    gap: 8px;
  }
  .col-header.time-head { grid-column: 1; color: var(--muted); font-size: 11px; }
  .col-header.main-head { grid-column: 2; color: #C4B5FD; background: rgba(124,58,237,.07); border-left: 1px solid var(--border); }
  .col-header.fe-head   { grid-column: 3; color: #6EE7B7; background: rgba(5,150,105,.07);  border-left: 1px solid var(--border); }
  .col-header.be-head   { grid-column: 4; color: #FCD34D; background: rgba(217,119,6,.07);  border-left: 1px solid var(--border); }
  .col-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; }

  /* ── TIME LABELS ──────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .time-label {
    grid-column: 1;
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-start;
    justify-content: flex-end;
    padding: 10px 14px 0 0;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--muted);
    letter-spacing: .05em;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    position: relative;
  }

  /* ── TRACK CELLS (background) ─────────────────────────────── */
  .track-cell {
    border-left: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    background: var(--surface);
    padding: var(--gap);
    position: relative;
  }
  .track-cell:nth-child(odd) { background: var(--surface2); }

  /* ── SESSION BLOCKS ───────────────────────────────────────── */
  .session {
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    padding: 12px 14px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 6px;
    height: 100%;
    border: 1px solid transparent;
    transition: transform .15s, box-shadow .15s;
    cursor: pointer;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .session:hover {
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.4);
    z-index: 2;
  }
  .session-title {
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 700;
    line-height: 1.3;
    color: #fff;
  }
  .session-speaker {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,.6);
    font-weight: 500;
  }
  .session-speaker::before { content: '👤 '; font-size: 10px; }
  .session-tag {
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: .1em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 3px 8px;
    border-radius: 20px;
    width: fit-content;
    margin-top: auto;
  }

  /* MAIN STAGE session */
  .session.s-main {
    background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(124,58,237,.22) 0%, rgba(124,58,237,.08) 100%);
    border-color: rgba(124,58,237,.35);
  }
  .session.s-main .session-tag { background: rgba(124,58,237,.3); color: #C4B5FD; border: 1px solid rgba(124,58,237,.5); }

  /* FRONTEND session */
  .session.s-fe {
    background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(5,150,105,.22) 0%, rgba(5,150,105,.08) 100%);
    border-color: rgba(5,150,105,.35);
  }
  .session.s-fe .session-tag { background: rgba(5,150,105,.3); color: #6EE7B7; border: 1px solid rgba(5,150,105,.5); }

  /* BACKEND session */
  .session.s-be {
    background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(217,119,6,.22) 0%, rgba(217,119,6,.08) 100%);
    border-color: rgba(217,119,6,.35);
  }
  .session.s-be .session-tag { background: rgba(217,119,6,.3); color: #FCD34D; border: 1px solid rgba(217,119,6,.5); }

  /* KEYNOTE session (spans all columns) */
  .session.s-key {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(232,67,147,.2) 0%, rgba(91,110,245,.2) 100%);
    border-color: rgba(232,67,147,.4);
    flex-direction: row;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 24px;
    padding: 20px 32px;
  }
  .session.s-key .session-tag { background: rgba(232,67,147,.3); color: #F9A8D4; border: 1px solid rgba(232,67,147,.5); margin-top: 0; }
  .session.s-key .session-title { font-size: 20px; }
  .session.s-key .session-speaker { font-size: 14px; }
